channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dodgers' Betts dealing with illness in Japan, Roberts hopeful he'll be ready for opening day
item.description: Shortstop Mookie Betts will miss the Los Angeles Dodgers’ two exhibition games in Japan because of an illness.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lewis Hamilton 8th in qualifying in Ferrari debut as Norris takes pole for F1 race in Australia
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — McLaren locked up the front row in Melbourne for Sunday’s Australian Grand Prix, having dominated its rivals, including Red Bull, Mercedes, and Ferrari — whose drivers, Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton, will start from seventh and eighth on the grid.
item.dc:creator: STEWART BELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Withers' lane violation adds improbable twist to UNC's failed comeback against No. 1 Duke in ACCs
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Jae'Lyn Withers stood in a hallway of the Spectrum Center, his left arm resting around the shoulders of North Carolina coach Hubert Davis. He was surrounded by reporters, all wanting to know a simple question.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Zuby Ejiofor much more than just most improved in record-setting performance for No. 6 St. John's
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Maybe most improved didn't really do Zuby Ejiofor justice. The junior forward delivered an overpowering performance Friday night for No. 6 St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UVU advances to WAC Tournament championship
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Valley basketball team is one win away from its first ever trip to the NCAA Tournament. The Wolverines are moving on to the WAC Tournament championship game for the first time ever after cruising past Seattle University in the semifinals Friday night, 68-55.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nail-biter: Carondelet holds off rally led by “Mamba Five” star, captures CIF D-I state title
item.description: CIF girls Division I basketball championship: Carondelet holds off Kobe Bryant pupil Amalia Holquin, captures title
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: No. 96 fits Hurricanes' Roslovic just right as he scores goal 2nd straight game
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — Jack Roslovic got his No. 96 jersey back, and he's wearing it well. The Carolina Hurricanes center scored a goal in a second straight game and he has four points over three games since reclaiming the number.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 1 Duke holds off furious North Carolina rally to win 74-71, reach ACC title game without Flagg
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Kon Knueppel scored 17 points and No. 1 Duke held off a furious second half rally by North Carolina to beat its rival for the third time this season, 74-71 on Friday night to reach the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship game.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU gets shut down by #2 Houston, 74-54
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the Big 12 Tournament quarterfinals, BYU scored 49 points in the first half against Iowa State. But in the semifinals against #2 Houston, BYU didn't eclipse the 49-point mark until there were three minutes left in the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jessie Holmes says his dogs deserve all the credit for his 'magical' first Iditarod win
item.description: JUNEAU, Alaska (AP) — Bundled-up well wishers lined a street along the Bering Sea coastline in the early morning darkness Friday, cheering musher Jessie Holmes as he won Alaska's Iditarod Trail Sled Dog Race.
item.dc:creator: BECKY BOHRER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Min Woo Lee and Akshay Bhatia share lead at The Players as Justin Thomas ties course mark with 62
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Min Woo Lee and Akshay Bhatia shared the lead at The Players Championship going into a weekend with strong wind in the forecast and the potential for a wide-open chase. That includes Justin Thomas, the biggest surprise Friday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Plucky Lakers nearly beat Nuggets despite Luka Doncic, LeBron James among LA's sidelined starters
item.description: Luka Doncic didn't play in the Lakers' 131-126 loss at Denver Friday night, joining LeBron James on the team's lengthy list of unavailable players.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tampa, Orlando line up to make pitch to bring Rays to their city
item.description: The development deal to build the Tampa Bay Rays a new stadium in St. Petersburg appears to be dead. Now, other groups are lining up to buy the team and take it to another city.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake looks to bounce back in Houston after tough home loss
item.description: After a disappointing 3-1 loss to expansion side San Diego FC at home last Saturday, Real Salt Lake looks to rebound on the road this weekend against a familiar foe: the Houston Dynamo.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Maine's federal funding freeze from Trump's USDA reversed
item.description: The federal funding freeze against Maine imposed by President Donald Trump's Department of Agriculture during Title IX and Title VI investigations has been reversed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michigan State basketball surges past Oregon to secure Big Ten Tournament semi-final spot
item.description: The Big Ten Tournament’s No. 1 seeded Michigan State Spartans outmanned the No. 8 seeded Oregon Ducks 74-64 to advance to the semi-finals.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: NFL Draft: How to watch, dates, draft order and potential top picks
item.description: Quarterbacks Cam Ward and Shedeur Sanders figure to be among the top picks in next month's NFL draft, though there's no current consensus that either player — or any quarterback — will be the No. 1 overall selection.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry becomes first player in NBA history to make 4,000 3-pointers
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry's shooting range and accuracy from way back have long stood alone — whether with a defender or two in his face or when letting it fly from the logo.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Steph Curry becomes first player in NBA history with 4,000 career 3-pointers made
item.description: Golden State Warriors star point guard Steph Curry became the first player in NBA history to make 4,000 3-pointers in the team's win on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-NFL star Le'Veon Bell ordered to pay $25M to cousin who alleges he sexually assaulted her: report
item.description: Le'Veon Bell has reportedly been ordered to pay $25 million to a cousin who claimed he sexually assaulted her for about a decade, beginning when she was about 6 years old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Bears signing former Commanders wide receiver in free agency
item.description: The Chicago Bears are signing free agent wide receiver Olamide Zaccheaus, who recorded a career-high 45 receptions for 506 yards and three TD catches with the Washington Commanders in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego St. women beat Wyoming in triple OT for MWC title
item.description: Veronica Sheffey scored 24 points and Cali Clark recorded a double-double and fourth-seeded San Diego State clinched the automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament beating No. 2 seed Wyoming 72-68 in triple overtime of the Mountain West Conference Tournament on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah moves closer to playoff berth with 3-2 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After blowing leads in their two previous meetings with the Anaheim Ducks this season, the Utah Hockey Club wasn't about to let it happen a third time.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz give Grizzlies a scare, but lose seventh straight
item.description: MEMPHIS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz are well on their way to their worst record in franchise history, but they're not going down without a fight. Luke Kennard scored 30 points and Ja Morant had 28, helping the Memphis Grizzlies top the Utah Jazz 122-115 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mallory Swanson will miss Chicago Stars' NWSL season opener for personal reasons
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Chicago Stars forward Mallory Swanson will miss the team's National Women's Soccer League season opener on Friday night against the Orlando Pride for personal reasons. Coach Lorne Donaldson said Wednesday that he believed Swanson's status was week-to-week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Lacrosse: Carlsbad 11, Granite Hills 7
item.description: EL CAJON (KUSI)- Boys Lacrosse action on Monday night in El Cajon with Granite Hills hosting Carlsbad. The Lancers win a very good game 11-7. Despite Carson Kowalsky, just a junior having a great game, scoring four goals for Granite Hills.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: George, Filipowski score 25 in Jazz loss to Sixers
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George and Kyle Filipowski each scored 25 points, but the Utah Jazz dropped its fifth straight game, losing at Philadelphia Sunday night, 126-122. Lonnie Walker IV and Quentin Grimes scored 25 points apiece for the victories 76ers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: DK Metcalf is leaving Seattle for Pittsburgh with a new deal in tow, AP sources say
item.description: The Seattle Seahawks are sending two-time Pro Bowler D.K. Metcalf to Pittsburgh for at least a second-round pick, sources with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5
